# clickhouse_user (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up an organization member by email or user ID. Exactly one of `email` or `id` must be set.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "clickhouse_user" "alice" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
}

data "clickhouse_role" "member" {
  name = "Member"
}

resource "clickhouse_role_assignment" "alice_member" {
  role_id  = data.clickhouse_role.member.id
  user_ids = [data.clickhouse_user.alice.id]
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) Email address of the user. Exactly one of id or email must be set.
- `id` (String) User ID. Exactly one of id or email must be set.

### Read-Only

- `assigned_roles` (Attributes List) Roles assigned to the user. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assigned_roles))
- `joined_at` (String) Timestamp when the user joined the organization.
- `name` (String) Display name of the user.

<a id="nestedatt--assigned_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assigned_roles`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The ID of the assigned role.
- `name` (String) The name of the assigned role.
- `type` (String) The type of the assigned role (system or custom).
